case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EMMA JUDITH VELASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, EMMA JUDITH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, EMMA JUDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, EMMA JUDITH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMMA JUDITH VELASQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/09/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
